items.hook: HDB resale prices have dropped for two consecutive quarters
items.caption:
HDB resale prices have dropped for two consecutive quarters. That makes this a trend, not a temporary dip. If you are selling, today's buyers have more options and they know what similar flats are transacting at. See the actual transaction data for your block and town for free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
HDB转售价格已连续两个季度下跌，这已经不是短暂波动，而是一个趋势。如果你正在卖HDB，现在的买家有更多选择，对行情也更了解。定价要贴近市场实际，不要只看去年的高点。到propsight.sg免费查看同区同类型单位的实际成交价，链接在bio。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: BCA has found that boutique condos are more likely to have construction defects than lar
items.caption:
BCA has found that boutique condos are more likely to have construction defects than larger projects. If you are buying into a small development, do not rush the handover. Get a professional defect inspection done, document every issue in writing, and push the developer to rectify before you move in. Free tools to help you track your purchase at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
建屋发展局发现，精品condo比大型项目更容易出现建筑缺陷。如果你正在购买小型condo，交钥匙时不要着急。请专业人士进行验房，把所有问题书面记录下来，并给开发商时间在你入住前完成修缮。更多免费置业工具，请上propsight.sg，链接在简介栏。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: A new launch and a resale condo at the same price are not actually the same cost
items.caption:
A new launch and a resale condo at the same price are not actually the same cost. With a new launch you pay in stages as construction hits each milestone, which means your loan starts accruing interest months or years before you get your keys. Add that up over a typical three-year build and the gap can be significant. Run the numbers on both options with the free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
新推出的condo和二手condo标价一样，不代表实际成本一样。买新项目要按建筑进度分期付款，也就是说在拿钥匙之前，贷款利息就已经在跑了。按三年建设期算下来，这笔利息可以是一笔很大的数目，但在宣传材料里根本看不到。做决定之前，先用propsight.sg的免费工具把两个选项的真实成本算清楚，链接在bio里。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: HDB rental yields are running at 6.1% gross right now, almost double what a private cond
items.caption:
HDB rental yields are running at 6.1% gross right now, almost double what a private condo earns you. Private property still wins on capital appreciation and lifestyle, but on pure cash return, HDB is the stronger landlord play this year. The full breakdown, including why the suburbs are rising while prime is the only segment falling, is in our free monthly market report. Read it at propsight.sg/market-analysis, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
目前HDB的毛租金回报率约为6.1%，几乎是私人公寓3.6%的两倍。私宅在资本增值和生活品质方面仍有优势，但若你看重稳定的现金收益，HDB目前反而是更实际的出租选择。我们的每月市场报告详细拆解了大众市场与高端私宅的走势，包括为何郊区房价在上涨，而核心中央区却是唯一下跌的板块。完整报告请前往propsight.sg/market-analysis，链接在个人主页。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Where Singapore prices are really moving.
